Name: Bypass spam filtering for trusted sender contoso.com
Comments: Skip spam filtering for messages from contoso.com that pass DMARC (dmarc=pass or dmarc=bestguesspass). Adds an X-ETR header for traceability. Replace contoso.com with the actual partner domain. Never use accepted domains or popular consumer domains here, this widens the attack surface.
SetHeaderValue: Bypass spam filtering for authenticated sender 'contoso.com'
